A helyzet pikantériája, hogy miután a Tisza megszerezte az alkotmányozó többséget, olyanok kezdtek a jogállamért aggódni, akik addig az illiberális államot hirdették.

BBC.summary: The public sale is also expected to make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.

BBC.title: Northern Ireland protests pass off without incident after two nights of unrest

TechCrunch.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
TechCrunch.summary: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

TechCrunch.title: Oracle warns of security bug that hackers abused to breach 100+ companies
TechCrunch.summary: The tech giant warned of a security flaw that a cybercrime gang said it's exploiting as part of a mass-hacking campaign. Google said it notified more than 100 organizations that had potentially vulnerable servers.

TechCrunch.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
TechCrunch.summary: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the  risk of outright fraud.

TechCrunch.summary: Bluesky's latest feature is group chats, arriving amid a shift in focus on building features for smaller communities.

TechCrunch.summary: By integrating an AI assistant directly into Edits, Meta is aiming to keep creators engaged on Instagram as it continues to compete with TikTok and YouTube for creators' attention.

TechCrunch.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
TechCrunch.summary: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

TechCrunch.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
TechCrunch.summary: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

TechCrunch.title: Waymo launches a loyalty program with 10% cash back and free cancellations
TechCrunch.summary: Members of the program, called "Waymo Premier," will have to pony up $29.99 per month.

TechCrunch.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
TechCrunch.summary: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.

TechCrunch.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
TechCrunch.summary: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.

TechCrunch.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
